name: Izzet Lessons
macro_plan: A combo-control deck that survives early aggression with cheap interaction and a one-drop body (Gran-Gran), then assembles a card-advantage engine: looting effects fill the graveyard with Lessons so Accumulate Wisdom draws three, while Monument to Endurance and Artist's Talent convert every loot into mana, damage, or cards. Gran-Gran and Artist's Talent are also cost reducers and discard outlets. The key danger is letting it land a cost reducer or discard outlet while Monument to Endurance is on the board or in hand — that turns the engine on and snowballs.

mana_reducers.notes: Gran-Gran reduces spell costs and Artist's Talent reduces costs as it filters. Both are also discard outlets — high-priority to deny under Monument to Endurance.

card_advantage.notes: Accumulate Wisdom is the payoff (draw three with three Lessons in yard). Monument to Endurance is a recurring advantage engine.

dig_draw.notes: Looting / cantrip effects that dig and fill the graveyard with Lessons.

win_conditions.notes: Monument + Artist's Talent engine grinds out the game; Stormchaser's Otters provide a clock the opponent can't ignore.

threats.notes: Otter tokens with prowess and the Gran-Gran body.

removal.notes: Cheap spot removal and tempo bounce to survive to the engine turns.

wrath.notes: Sweepers (often sideboard) for go-wide and token decks.

discard_outlets.notes: Looting / discard outlets that fuel Monument to Endurance and bin Lessons. Denying these under Monument is the matchup priority.

graveyard_enablers.notes: Anything that puts Lessons in the graveyard toward Accumulate Wisdom.

recursion.notes: Bounce re-buys ETB/triggers; Monument recovers resources.

engines.notes: The core advantage engine. Monument to Endurance is the lynchpin.

payoff_cards.notes: The cards the looting/Lessons setup is building toward.

combo_pieces.notes: Monument + a discard outlet/looter is the engine; Accumulate Wisdom + cost reducer is Ancestral Recall.

mana_fixing.notes: Duals fixing U/R; Agna Qel'a doubles as a discard outlet.

lands.notes: Standard land count; Agna Qel'a turns flood into fuel.

dual_role_cards.notes: One-drop body, cost reducer, and discard outlet that enables Monument to Endurance.
Cost reducer + looter + engine piece. Both reducer and discard outlet.
The lynchpin engine; converts every loot into mana/damage/cards.

tells: Monument to Endurance or Artist's Talent deployed

predicted_lines.trigger: Monument to Endurance in play and a discard outlet/looter available
predicted_lines.line: Loot repeatedly to trigger Monument (mana/Lava Spike/cards) and bin Lessons toward Accumulate Wisdom.

predicted_lines.trigger: Three Lessons in graveyard, Accumulate Wisdom in hand, cost reducer down
predicted_lines.line: Cast Accumulate Wisdom cheaply to draw three and bury the opponent in cards.

predicted_lines.trigger: Under early pressure with Gran-Gran available
predicted_lines.line: Deploy Gran-Gran to block and stabilize, holding cheap removal/bounce for the biggest threat.
